item.title: Anthropic 与 SpaceX 达成算力协议，获超 22 万块英伟达 GPU
item.guid: Anthropic-与-SpaceX-达成算力协议，获超-22-万块英伟达-GPU
item.description:
Early this morning, Anthropic announced a computing power cooperation agreement with SpaceX, which will use all the computing resources of the SpaceX Colossus 1 data center. According to the agreement, Anthropic will acquire over 300 megawatts of new computing power this month, involving more than 220,000 Nvidia GPUs. 今天凌晨，Anthropic 宣布与 SpaceX 达成算力合作协议，将使用 SpaceX Colossus 1 数据中心的全部算力资源。依据协议，Anthropic 将在本月内获得逾 300 兆瓦的新增算力，涉及超过 22 万块英伟达 GPU。

Anthropic stated that this batch of new computing power will be directly used to increase the service capacity for Claude Pro and Claude Max subscribers. Anthropic simultaneously announced adjustments to the usage restrictions for Claude Code and Claude API, effective immediately. Anthropic 表示，这批新增算力将直接用于提升 Claude Pro 和 Claude Max 订阅用户的服务容量。Anthropic 同步宣布对 Claude Code 及 Claude API 的使用限制进行调整，即日起生效。

    Double the five-hour rate limit for Claude Code, applicable to Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise plans;

    Remove the Claude Code rate limit degradation mechanism for Pro and Max accounts during peak hours;

    Significantly increase the API rate limits for Claude Opus series models.

As an extension of this collaboration, Anthropic has also expressed interest in exploring cooperation with SpaceX to jointly develop multi-gigawatt orbital AI computing infrastructure, though specific plan details have not yet been disclosed. 作为此次合作的延伸，Anthropic 还表示有意与 SpaceX 探索合作，共同开发数吉瓦级的轨道 AI 算力基础设施，但目前尚未披露具体计划细节。

item.title: ChatGPT 广告平台扩容：自助投放上线，按点击付费正式引入
item.guid: ChatGPT-广告平台扩容：自助投放上线，按点击付费正式引入
item.description:
Yesterday, OpenAI officially announced the expansion of its ChatGPT advertising system, launching a beta version of a self-service ad management tool (Ads Manager) for US advertisers. It also introduced a cost-per-click (CPC) bidding model and conversion measurement tools, allowing businesses of more sizes to directly place ads within ChatGPT. 昨天，OpenAI 官宣扩展 ChatGPT 广告系统，推出面向美国广告主的自助广告管理工具测试版（Ads Manager），并引入按点击付费（CPC）竞价模式，同时引入转化衡量工具，允许更多规模的企业直接在 ChatGPT 中投放广告。

Regarding bidding models, ChatGPT ads previously only supported cost-per-mille (CPM) bidding. With the addition of CPC bidding, advertisers only pay when a user clicks on an ad, which helps link ad spending more directly to actual user behavior. OpenAI stated that more bidding and optimization goals will be supported in the future. 竞价模式方面，此前 ChatGPT 广告仅支持按千次展示付费（CPM）。新增 CPC 竞价后，广告主只需在用户点击广告时付费，有助于将广告支出与实际用户行为更直接地挂钩。OpenAI 表示，未来还将支持更多竞价与优化目标。

In terms of measurement tools, OpenAI has launched the Conversions API and pixel tracking features. Advertisers can use these to understand user behavior after clicking on an ad, such as purchases, registrations, or form submissions. However, the data obtained is aggregated and does not involve individual conversation content. 衡量工具方面，OpenAI 已上线 Conversions API 与像素追踪功能，广告主可据此了解用户点击广告后的后续行为，如购买、注册或提交表单等，但获取的是聚合数据，不涉及个人对话内容。

Regarding purchasing channels, advertisers can now register, set budgets and bids, upload ad creatives, manage campaign plans, and view performance data directly through Ads Manager, without needing to rely on intermediaries. 在购买渠道方面，广告主现可通过 Ads Manager 自行注册、设置预算与出价、上传广告素材、管理投放计划并查看效果数据，无需再依赖中间代理。

OpenAI emphasized in the announcement that ChatGPT's responses remain independent of ad content, and user conversations will not be shared with advertisers ; the advertising platform is currently in its early stages, and will continue to expand ad formats, targeting goals, and platform capabilities in the future. OpenAI 在公告中强调，ChatGPT 的回答与广告内容保持独立，用户对话不会被共享给广告主 ；目前广告平台仍处于早期阶段，后续将继续扩展广告形式、投放目标与平台能力。

item.title: DeepSeek 首轮融资曝光，估值 450 亿美元
item.guid: DeepSeek-首轮融资曝光，估值-450-亿美元
item.description: According to the Financial Times, several institutions are currently seeking to lead DeepSeek's first round of financing. If negotiations are successful, DeepSeek's valuation in this round will reach approximately $45 billion. Currently, the final list of investors for this round of financing has not yet been determined. 据《金融时报》报道，多家机构目前正寻求领投 DeepSeek 的首轮融资。若谈判顺利，DeepSeek 在本轮的估值将达到约 450 亿美元。目前，本轮融资的最终投资机构名单仍未确定。

item.title: 三星宣布在中国大陆停售所有家电产品
item.guid: 三星宣布在中国大陆停售所有家电产品
item.description:
Yesterday, Samsung (China) Investment Co., Ltd. officially issued a notice regarding adjustments to its home appliance business: "To cope with the rapidly changing market environment, after careful consideration, Samsung Electronics has decided to stop selling all home appliance products, including televisions and monitors, in the Chinese mainland market." 昨天，三星（中国）投资有限公司正式发布家电产品业务调整通知：「为应对急剧变化的市场环境，经慎重研究，三星电子决定在中国大陆市场停止销售含电视、显示器在内的所有家电产品。」

It is reported that the scope of this discontinuation covers a full range of home appliance products, including televisions, monitors, large commercial displays, air conditioners, refrigerators, washing machines, dryers, washer-dryer combos, garment care machines, audio systems, projectors, vacuum cleaners, and air purifiers. 据悉，此次停售范围涵盖电视、显示器、大型商用显示器、空调、冰箱、洗衣机、干衣机、洗衣干衣一体机、衣物护理机、音响、投影仪、吸尘器、空气净化器等全线家用电器产品。

For users who have already purchased Samsung home appliances, the company stated that it will continue to provide after-sales service strictly in accordance with the "Consumer Rights Protection Law" and national "Three Guarantees" regulations. Users encountering performance issues can go to an authorized service center for inspection and troubleshooting. 针对已购买三星家电产品的用户，公司表示仍将严格按照《消费者权益保护法》及国家三包规定继续提供售后服务，用户如遇性能故障，可通过授权服务中心进行检测排查。

This adjustment does not affect the mobile phone business; Samsung explicitly stated that "mobile phone products are being sold normally." After the adjustment, Samsung's consumer electronics products sold in the Chinese mainland market will primarily consist of mobile phones and storage products. 此次调整不影响手机业务，三星方面明确表示「手机产品正常销售」。调整完成后，三星在中国内地市场销售的消费电子产品将主要剩余手机及存储类产品。

item.title: 苹果因 AI Siri 延迟赔偿 2.5 亿美元，每台 iPhone 最高可获赔 95 美元
item.guid: 苹果因-AI-Siri-延迟赔偿-2.5-亿美元，每台-iPhone-最高可获赔-95-美元
item.description:
On May 5, local time, Apple officially reached a $250 million settlement agreement regarding a class-action lawsuit for false advertising stemming from the delayed launch of the new Siri. 当地时间 5 月 5 日，苹果就因新版 Siri 延迟上线引发的虚假宣传集体诉讼正式达成 2.5 亿美元和解协议。

According to 9To5Mac, the $250 million settlement agreement covers owners of Apple Intelligence-supported devices purchased within the United States between June 10, 2024, and March 29, 2025, including the iPhone 15 Pro series and all iPhone 16 series (including 16e) models. 据 9To5Mac 报道，该项 2.5 亿美元的和解协议覆盖在 2024 年 6 月 10 日至 2025 年 3 月 29 日期间，于美国境内购买支持 Apple Intelligence 设备的机主，涵盖 iPhone 15 Pro 系列及全部 iPhone 16 系列（含 16e）机型。

Eligible single devices are expected to receive $25 in compensation, with the specific claim amount dynamically adjusted based on the actual number of applications submitted, up to a maximum payout of $95 per device. 符合条件的单台设备预计可获赔 25 美元，具体索赔金额将根据实际提交申请的人数进行动态调整，单设备最高赔付上限为 95 美元。

Apple did not admit to any wrongdoing in the settlement agreement and maintained that its business operations comply with relevant regulations. 苹果在和解协议中未承认任何不当行为，并坚称其商业运作符合相关法规。

An Apple official spokesperson responded that since the release of Apple Intelligence, dozens of features such as visual intelligence, real-time translation, and writing tools have been successively launched. This settlement aims to quickly resolve disputes surrounding "two features that were not launched as scheduled" to ensure the company focuses its core efforts on product innovation. 苹果官方发言人回应称，自 Apple Intelligence 发布以来，已相继推出视觉智能、实时翻译及写作工具等数十项功能，此次和解旨在快速解决围绕「两项未如期上线功能」的争议，以确保公司将核心精力集中于产品创新。

item.title: Google 称 Android 不会推出「液态玻璃」
item.guid: Google-称-Android-不会推出「液态玻璃」
item.description:
Yesterday, Sameer Samat, head of Google Android, posted a 15-second teaser video on X to build momentum for The Android Show event scheduled for May 12. 昨天，Google Android 负责人 Sameer Samat 在 X 上发布了一段 15 秒的预告视频，为定于 5 月 12 日举办的 The Android Show 活动造势。

In the video, after the Android mascot Bugdroid pulls down a light switch, its appearance becomes transparent and glass-like, raising concerns among some users that Android will follow Apple in launching a 'Liquid Glass' style UI design. 视频中，Android 吉祥物 Bugdroid 拉下一个灯光开关后，外观变得透明、类玻璃质感，引发部分用户担忧 Android 将跟随苹果推出「液态玻璃」（Liquid Glass）风格的 UI 设计。

In response, Samat explicitly denied it in a Twitter reply, stating directly that 'this will not happen,' and Google engineer Mishaal Rahman immediately followed up with a clarification. 对此，Samat 在 Twitter 回复中明确否认，直接表示「这不会发生」，Google 工程师 Mishaal Rahman 也随即跟进澄清。

The Android Show will be broadcast live on YouTube on May 12th at 10 AM PT (May 13th at 1 AM Beijing time), where more information about Android 17 and the progress of Google's desktop-oriented Aluminium OS project is expected to be announced. The Android Show 将于 5 月 12 日太平洋时间上午 10 时（北京时间 5 月 13 日凌晨 1 时）在 YouTube 直播，预计届时将公布更多 Android 17 相关信息，以及 Google 面向桌面端的 Aluminium OS 项目进展。

item.title: 王腾开通抖音和小红书账号、今日宜休首款产品已在筹备
item.guid: 王腾开通抖音和小红书账号、今日宜休首款产品已在筹备
item.description:
Yesterday, Wang Teng, former General Manager of Xiaomi China Marketing Department and General Manager of Redmi brand, opened Douyin and Xiaohongshu accounts named 'Wang Teng Thomas (Today's Rest Edition)' and released his first video, with his personal profile stating 'Founder and CEO of Today's Rest Technology Co.' In the video, Wang Teng officially confirmed his brand name as 'ISHO'. 昨天，前小米中国区市场部总经理、Redmi 品牌总经理王腾开通抖音和小红书账号「王腾 Thomas(今日宜休版)」，并发布首条视频，个人简介为「今日宜休科技公司创始人兼 CEO」。视频中，王腾正式确认旗下品牌名称为「ISHO」。

He stated that Today's Rest focuses on the sleep health sector, aiming for more than just a single product, planning to spend 5 to 10 years building a complete sleep solution from monitoring to improvement. According to previous inquiries by blogger 'Digital Chat Station,' Wang Teng also said that Today's Rest products will be integrated into the Mijia ecosystem. 他表示，今日宜休主攻睡眠健康领域，目标不止于单一产品，计划用 5 至 10 年时间打造一套从监测到改善的完整睡眠解决方案。据博主「数码闲聊站」此前询问，王腾也表示今日宜休产品将接入米家生态。

Wang Teng also revealed that the company's first product and its accompanying app are both in an advanced stage of preparation. 王腾还透露，公司首款产品及配套 App 均已进入紧密筹备阶段。

Previously, Today's Rest completed a seed round financing of tens of millions of yuan, with investors including Hillhouse Capital, ZHIYUAN Robotics, and Xilinmen. Wang Teng stated that the core members of the startup team primarily come from technology companies such as Xiaomi and Huawei, possessing experience in software and hardware product development. 此前，今日宜休已完成数千万元规模的种子轮融资，投资方包括高瓴创投、智元机器人及喜临门。王腾表示，初创团队核心成员主要来自小米、华为等科技公司，具备软硬件产品开发经验。

item.title: 曝 Kimi 将完成 20 亿美元新融资，估值突破 200 亿美元
item.guid: 曝-Kimi-将完成-20-亿美元新融资，估值突破-200-亿美元
item.description:
According to LatePost, Kimi's parent company, Moonshot AI, is about to complete a new round of $2 billion in financing, pushing its post-investment valuation past $20 billion. This round of financing is led by Meituan Longzhu, with China Mobile, CPE (CITIC Private Equity Funds), and others participating, and Longzhu alone invested over $200 million. 据《晚点 LatePost》报道，Kimi 母公司月之暗面即将完成新一轮 20 亿美元融资，投后估值突破 200 亿美元。本轮融资由美团龙珠领投，中国移动、CPE（中信产业基金）等参投，其中仅龙珠就出手超 2 亿美元。

In January and February this year, Kimi completed 3 rounds of intensive financing, raising $500 million, $700 million, and $700 million respectively. Including this round, Kimi's total financing in less than half a year exceeds $3.9 billion, and its latest valuation is more than four times higher than the approximately $4.3 billion in November last year. 今年 1 月和 2 月，Kimi 密集完成 3 轮融资，分别募得 5 亿美元、7 亿美元和 7 亿美元。算上本轮，不到半年内 Kimi 融资总额超 39 亿美元，最新估值较去年 11 月的约 43 亿美元翻了 4 倍有余。

To date, Kimi's cumulative financing has exceeded 37.6 billion RMB, making it the large model startup with the highest cumulative financing. 至此，Kimi 累计融资额已超 376 亿人民币，成为大模型创业公司中累计融资最多的公司。

item.title: 三星市值突破 1 万亿美元
item.guid: 三星市值突破-1-万亿美元
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, Samsung Electronics' stock price surged 13% in early trading yesterday, with its market capitalization breaking through $1 trillion to reach approximately 1,530 trillion Korean Won (about $1.04 trillion), becoming the second listed company in Asia, after TSMC, to exceed a $1 trillion market capitalization. 据《华尔街日报》报道，三星电子股价昨日早盘大涨 13%，市值一举突破 1 万亿美元，达到约 1530 万亿韩元（约合 1.04 万亿美元），成为继台积电之后，亚洲第二家市值超过 1 万亿美元的上市公司。

Samsung's first-quarter financial report released last week showed that its revenue, net profit, and operating profit all hit record highs for the quarter, with the chip manufacturing division's operating profit accounting for over 90% of the company's total profit. Driven by Samsung's stock price, the Korea Composite Index surged 6.7% yesterday to 7402.18 points, breaking the 7000-point mark for the first time. 三星上周发布的一季度财报显示，该季度收入、净利润和营业利润均创历史新高，其中芯片制造部门营业利润占公司总利润的 90% 以上。受三星股价带动，韩国综合指数昨日大涨 6.7%，至 7402.18 点，首次突破 7000 点关口。

The report points out that the driving force behind Samsung's continuously rising market capitalization is the strong demand for memory chips for AI infrastructure construction. Samsung stated that its production capacity for this year has been completely sold out, and revenue from High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) products is expected to more than double, with the newly launched HBM4 potentially accounting for more than half of the total HBM revenue. 报道指出，三星市值持续走高的推动力，在于 AI 基础设施建设对存储芯片的旺盛需求。三星方面表示，今年产能已全部售罄，来自高带宽存储（HBM）产品的收入预计将增长逾两倍，其中最新推出的 HBM4 可能占到 HBM 总收入的一半以上。

item.title: 比亚迪成英国最大电动汽车品牌，今年累计销量同比增长 124%
item.guid: 比亚迪成英国最大电动汽车品牌，今年累计销量同比增长-124%
item.description:
According to Carscoops, BYD cited data from the Society of Motor Manufacturers and Traders (SMMT) stating that in the first four months of this year, BYD cumulatively sold 12,754 pure electric vehicles in the UK, with a market share exceeding 7% , becoming the largest electric vehicle brand in the UK, surpassing BMW, Tesla, and Volkswagen. 据 Carscoops 报道，比亚迪援引英国汽车制造商和贸易商协会（SMMT）数据称，今年前四个月，比亚迪在英国累计售出 12754 辆纯电动汽车， 市场份额超过 7% ，成为英国最大电动汽车品牌，超越宝马、特斯拉和大众。

BYD also stated that the company has become the best-selling electric vehicle brand among private buyers in the UK. Notably, none of BYD's models are within the scope of the UK electric vehicle subsidy — a subsidy that can reduce eligible models by up to £3,750. 比亚迪同时表示，公司已成为英国私人买家中最畅销的电动汽车品牌。值得注意的是，比亚迪旗下车型均不在英国电动汽车补贴范围之内 —— 该补贴最高可为符合条件的车型减免 3750 英镑。

BYD attributes its sales growth to a wide-ranging product lineup, with models on sale ranging from the Dolphin Surf (Seagull) at £18,675 (approximately RMB 170,000) to the Sealion 7 (Sealion 07 EV) at £47,025 (approximately RMB 435,000), covering multiple price segments. 比亚迪将销量增长归因于覆盖面较广的产品阵容，在售车型价格区间从 18675 英镑（约合人民币 17 万元）的 Dolphin Surf（海鸥）到 47025 英镑（约 43.5 万元）的 Sealion 7（海狮 07 EV），覆盖多个价格段。

Bono Ge, head of BYD UK, stated that the UK electric vehicle market grew by 22% this year, and BYD secured this leading position more than three years after entering the UK market. 比亚迪英国负责人 Bono Ge 表示，英国电动汽车市场今年同比增长 22%，比亚D在进入英国市场三年多后拿下了这一头部位置。

Since the beginning of this year, BYD's overall sales in the UK (including all powertrain types) have increased by 124% year-on-year, reaching 26,396 units, surpassing several European brands such as Citroën (12,142 units), Cupra (15,171 units), Dacia (10,250 units), Fiat (2,320 units), Land Rover (25,313 units), MINI (18,814 units), and Renault (23,645 units). 今年以来，比亚迪在英国的整体销量（含所有动力形式）同比增长 124%，达到 26396 辆，超过雪铁龙（12,142 辆）、Cupra（15171 辆）、达契亚（10250 辆）、菲亚特（2320 辆）、路虎（25313 辆）、MINI（18814 辆）和雷诺（23645 辆）等多个欧洲品牌。

item.title: 宝马集团今年一季度营收 310.07 亿欧元，同比降 8.1%，净利润降 23.1%
item.guid: 宝马集团今年一季度营收-310.07-亿欧元，同比降-8.1%，净利润降-23.1%
item.description:
Yesterday, BMW Group released its first-quarter results for this year, achieving total revenue of €31.007 billion, a year-on-year decrease of 8.1%; net profit was €1.672 billion, a year-on-year decrease of 23.1%. In the first quarter, BMW Group delivered 565,780 vehicles to customers worldwide, a year-on-year decrease of 3.5%. By brand: 昨天，宝马集团发布今年第一季度业绩，期内实现总收入 310.07 亿欧元，同比下降 8.1%；净利润为 16.72 亿欧元，同比下降 23.1%。第一季度，宝马集团向全球客户交付汽车 565780 辆，同比下降 3.5%。分品牌来看：

    BMW brand delivered 496,006 vehicles, a year-on-year decrease of 4.6%, with one out of every ten vehicles being an M model;

  • MINI 品牌连续第五个季度实现销量增长，交付 68503 辆，同比增长 6.0%，纯电动车型占 MINI 总交付量的 35.1%；
  • 劳斯莱斯品牌交付 1271 辆，同比下降 8.0%；
  • 宝马摩托车交付摩托车及滑板车 42735 辆，同比下降 4.2%。

税前利润（EBT）为 23.48 亿欧元，同比下降 24.6%。成本端，销售成本降低 6.4%，集团管理及销售费用下降 5.1%；第一季度资本支出按计划压缩至 172.3 亿欧元，相较去年同期的 281.9 亿欧元下降 38.9%。

MINI 品牌是本季度少数实现销量正增长的业务，连续五个季度提升全球销量，且纯电动车型渗透率已超三分之一。宝马集团在报告中特别指出，主要汽车市场尤其是中国市场的激烈竞争，对定价和销售量均造成影响。

展望全年，宝马集团预计今年全球交付量将与去年持平，纯电动汽车销售占比与去年保持一致。公司表示，今年将进一步削减资本支出、制造成本、研发支出以及销售及管理费用。

item.title: AI 游戏平台 Astrocade 完成 5600 万美元融资，红杉领投、李飞飞任首席科学官
item.guid: AI-游戏平台-Astrocade-完成-5600-万美元融资，红杉领投、李飞飞任首席科学官
item.description:
昨日，斯坦福 HAI 联合主任李飞飞（Fei-Fei Li）以首席科学官（CSO）身份加入的 AI 游戏平台 Astrocade 宣布完成 5600 万美元融资。

本轮融资含 Sea 领投的 A 轮与红杉资本领投的 B 轮，谷歌 AI Futures Fund、英伟达、LG Technology Ventures 等机构参与跟投。

Astrocade 的核心功能是允许用户以自然语言描述创意，由 AI 在数分钟内生成可玩游戏，整个创作流程无需任何编程基础。

item.title: AMD 最新财报出炉：数据中心成营收大头
item.guid: AMD-最新财报出炉：数据中心成营收大头
item.description:
昨天，AMD 正式发布 2026 财年第一季度财报，受 AI 基础设施需求推动，其总营收与净利润均实现大幅同比增长。

第一季度总营收达 102.5 亿美元，同比增长 38%；美国通用会计准则（GAAP）下净利润为 13.8 亿美元，同比增长 95%；非 GAAP 下净利润为 22.65 亿美元，同比增长 45%。

  • 数据中心业务成为最大增长引擎，单季营收达 58 亿美元，同比增长 57%；
  • 客户端与游戏业务营收为 36 亿美元（同比增长 23%）；
  • 嵌入式业务营收为 8.73 亿美元（同比增长 6%）。

AMD 董事长兼 CEO 苏姿丰在官方声明中指出，数据中心现已成为公司营收与盈利增长的首要驱动力。

随着推理及智能体 AI 带动高性能 CPU 和加速器需求的上升，加之客户对 MI450 系列和 Helios 系统参与度的提升，预计服务器业务的增长将在未来显著提速。

基于当前强劲的市场动能，AMD 给出了乐观的业绩指引。公司预计 2026 财年第二季度营收约为 112 亿美元（上下浮动 3 亿美元），按中值计算预计同比增长约 46%，环比增长约 9%，非 GAAP 毛利率预期约为 56%。

item.title: 美国加密货币交易所 Coinbase 裁员约 700 人、废除纯管理岗、引入「单人团队」
item.guid: 美国加密货币交易所-Coinbase-裁员约-700-人、废除纯管理岗、引入「单人团队」
item.description:
Coinbase 昨日宣布裁员约 14%，涉及约 700 名员工。CEO Brian Armstrong 在全员信中将此次裁员归因于两个并行因素：加密货币市场的周期性下行，以及 AI 正在深刻改变公司的运营方式。

Armstrong 在信中表示，过去一年工程师借助 AI 可以将原本需要团队数周完成的工作压缩至数天，非技术团队也已能够直接交付生产代码，大量工作流程正在被自动化。Armstrong 宣布同步推进组织架构重组：

  • 管理层级压缩至 CEO/COO 以下最多 5 层；

    • Eliminate "pure management positions"; every leader must also be an active individual contributor, "like a player-coach";

    The company will also re-concentrate resources around "AI-native teams," exploring streamlined staffing models including "one-person teams," where one individual takes on the multiple roles of engineer, designer, and product manager.

Affected employees in the U.S. will receive at least 16 weeks of base pay, plus an additional 2 weeks for each year of service, as well as the next equity vesting opportunity and 6 months of COBRA health insurance. 美国受影响员工将获得至少 16 周基本工资，另加每工作一年额外 2 周，以及下一次股权兑现机会和 6 个月 COBRA 医疗保险。

Employees with work visas will receive additional transitional support, while employees outside the U.S. will receive similar compensation based on local regulations. Coinbase expects layoff-related costs to be approximately $50 million to $60 million, primarily for severance and employee benefits, with layoffs largely completed in the second quarter of this year. 持工作签证员工将获额外过渡支持，美国以外员工则依据当地法规获得类似补偿。Coinbase 预计裁员相关费用约为 5000 万至 6000 万美元，主要用于遣散费及员工福利，裁员将在今年第二季度基本完成。

item.title: 💡 泡泡玛特 CEO 称不担心 LABUBU 过气：买回家后持续产生情感链接
item.guid: 💡-泡泡玛特-CEO-称不担心-LABUBU-过气：买回家后持续产生情感链接
item.description:
According to Sina's "5D Investigation" report, Pop Mart Chairman and CEO Wang Ning recently gave an interview, responding to external doubts about whether LABUBU's popularity can be sustained. 据新浪《5D 调查》报道，泡泡玛特董事长兼 CEO 王宁近日接受访谈，对外界关于 LABUBU 热度能否持续的质疑作出回应。

He stated that he is not worried about this IP "suddenly becoming unpopular," reasoning that after consumers take the products home, "they will continuously form emotional connections with it, and new value will be born." 他表示，并不担心这一 IP「突然不受欢迎」，理由是消费者将产品带回家后，「会持续地产生和它的情感链接，会诞生新的价值」。

Regarding LABUBU's operational strategy, Wang Ning revealed that during LABUBU's peak popularity, the company proactively paused a large number of new product releases — products originally scheduled for 2025 were postponed to 2026, and all offline marketing activities and several external collaborations were halted. 在 LABUBU 的运营策略上，王宁透露，公司在 LABUBU 热度最高的阶段，主动暂停了大量新品发布 —— 原定于 2025 年推出的产品被推迟至 2026 年，同时叫停了全部线下营销活动及多项对外合作。

A good authorization empowers the product, but if not done well, it can instead be a drain on it.

When discussing his personal state in 2025, Wang Ning described the year as "like someone who just learned to drive being pulled to race in F1," and frankly stated that 2025 was "the most stressful, worst-sleeping, and unhealthiest year" in recent times. 在谈及 2025 年的个人状态时，王宁将这一年形容为「像一个刚学会开车的人被拉去开 F1」，并直言 2025 年是近几年「压力最大、睡眠最差、身体状况最不好的一年」。

When discussing the challenges the company faces in the future, Wang Ning pointed to the organizational level, believing that rapid corporate development can easily mask internal problems. 在谈及公司未来面临的挑战时，王宁将重点指向组织层面，认为企业高速发展期间容易掩盖内部问题。

If one only indulges in high growth and the superficial success of LABUBU, these issues will slowly accumulate and become major problems.

item.title: 小米 17T 系列曝光，还有手环 10 Pro
item.guid: 小米-17T-系列曝光，还有手环-10-Pro
item.description:
Recently, Xiaomi's new overseas phone, the 17T series, was officially unveiled. 日前，小米海外新机 17T 系列正式曝光。

In terms of appearance, the new phone adopts a design similar to the 15T series, offering three color options: blue, black, and purple. The Xiaomi 17T features a plastic frame, while the 17T Pro uses a metal frame. 外观方面，新机采用与 15T 系列类似的设计，提供蓝、黑、紫三种配色。小米 17T 采用塑料中框，17T Pro 采用金属中框。

Regarding core specifications, the Xiaomi 17T is equipped with a MediaTek Dimensity 8500-Ultra chip, a 6.59-inch 1.5K resolution 120Hz OLED screen, a built-in 6500mAh battery supporting 67W fast charging; the rear camera module includes a 50MP Light Hunter 800 main sensor and a 5x optical zoom telephoto lens. 在核心参数上，小米 17T 搭载联发科天玑 8500-Ultra 芯片，配备 6.59 英寸 1.5K 分辨率 120Hz OLED 屏幕，内置 6500mAh 电池并支持 67W 快充；后置影像模组包含 50MP 光影猎人 800 主摄与 5 倍光学变焦长焦镜头。

The Xiaomi 17T Pro, on the other hand, is equipped with a Dimensity 9500 chip, a 6.83-inch 144Hz OLED screen, an increased battery capacity of 7000mAh supporting 100W wired and 50W wireless dual fast charging, with the main camera simultaneously upgraded to a 50MP Light Hunter 950 sensor, and support for Wi-Fi 7 protocol. 而小米 17T Pro 则搭载天玑 9500 芯片，屏幕为 6.83 英寸 144Hz OLED，电池容量提升至 7000mAh 且支持 100W 有线与 50W 无线双快充，主摄同步升级为 50MP 光影猎人 950 传感器，并支持 Wi-Fi 7 协议。

According to GSMARENA, the latest renders of the Xiaomi Smart Band 10 Pro have also been exposed. 另据 GSMARENA 消息，小米手环 10 Pro 的最新渲染图也遭到曝光。

From the leaked renders, the Xiaomi Smart Band 10 Pro's exterior design shows no major changes, continuing the rectangular screen and metal frame of the Xiaomi Smart Band 9 Pro; the screen still features a four-equal narrow bezel design. Previous leaks indicated that the Xiaomi Smart Band 10 Pro will also offer a ceramic frame version. 从曝光的渲染图来看，小米手环 10 Pro 外观设计无大改变，延续小米手环 9 Pro 的长方形屏幕以及金属中框；屏幕依然采用四等窄边设计。此前爆料信息显示，本次小米手环 10 Pro 也将提供陶瓷中框版本。

item.title: 曝 Google 内部测试 AI 智能体「Remy」对标 OpenClaw
item.guid: 曝-Google-内部测试-AI-智能体「Remy」对标-OpenClaw
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Google is internally testing an AI agent codenamed "Remy," which runs in an employee-exclusive version of the Gemini app and is currently in the internal testing (dogfooding) phase. 据《商业内幕》报道，Google 正在内部测试一款代号为「Remy」的 AI 智能体，该产品运行于员工专属版本的 Gemini 应用中，目前处于内部测试（dogfooding）阶段。

According to an internal document and two informed sources, Remy is positioned as an "always-on personal agent" suitable for work, study, and daily life scenarios. Its official description states: 根据一份内部文件及两位知情人士透露，Remy 被定位为「全天候个人智能体」，适用于工作、学习和日常生活场景。其官方描述称：

Remy is a 24/7 personal agent powered by Gemini, upgrading the Gemini app into a true assistant capable of acting on your behalf, not just answering questions or generating content.

At a functional level, Remy can deeply integrate multiple Google services, actively monitor user concerns, handle complex tasks, and learn user preferences over time. 在功能层面，Remy 可深度整合 Google 旗下多项服务，能够主动监控用户关注的事项、处理复杂任务，并随时间推移学习用户偏好。

item.title: Metalenz 展示屏下版「Face ID」，预计 2028 年量产
item.guid: Metalenz-展示屏下版「Face-ID」，预计-2028-年量产
item.description:
According to Wired, optical startup Metalenz recently showcased its Polar ID under-display deployment solution at the Display Week exhibition in Los Angeles. This facial recognition system can be hidden beneath the OLED screen, completely eliminating camera cutouts. 据《连线》报道，光学初创公司 Metalenz 近日在洛杉矶 Display Week 展会上展示了 Polar ID 屏下部署方案。该面部识别系统可隐藏于 OLED 屏幕下方，彻底消除摄像头开孔。

Polar ID is based on optical metasurface and polarized light sensing technology, using a single-layer nanostructured flat lens to collect light, capable of distinguishing between real human faces and silicone masks. Polar ID 基于光学超表面与偏振光感应技术，使用单层纳米结构平面透镜采集光线，可区分真实人脸与硅胶面具。

CEO Rob Devlin stated that multiple third-party testing agencies have confirmed the system meets "the highest security standards." The under-display solution requires local thinning of the display panel, but Devlin claims the area is visually almost imperceptible and does not affect picture quality. CEO Rob Devlin 表示，多个第三方测试机构确认该系统已达「最高安全标准」。屏下方案需对显示面板局部减薄，但 Devlin 称该区域视觉上几乎不可察觉，不影响画质。

Regarding mass production, the standard version of Polar ID is expected to launch next year on mobile phones and laptops, while the under-display version is anticipated to enter the market in 2028. Metalenz has partnered with Qualcomm and is currently in early discussions with several major smartphone manufacturers regarding the under-display solution. 量产方面，标准版 Polar ID 预计明年搭载于手机和笔记本电脑上市，屏下版本则有望于 2028 年进入市场。Metalenz 已与高通达成合作，目前正与数家主要智能手机厂商就屏下方案进行早期洽谈。

item.title: 豆包家族首款全模态大模型 Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite 上线
item.guid: 豆包家族首款全模态大模型-Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite-上线
item.description:
ByteDance's Volcano Engine announced yesterday that Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite has completed its version upgrade, becoming the first full-modal model in the Doubao large model family to support unified understanding of video, image, audio, and text. 字节跳动旗下火山引擎昨日宣布，Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite 完成版本升级，成为豆包大模型家族首款支持视频、图像、音频与文本统一理解的全模态模型。

  • Visual understanding capabilities surpass Doubao-Seed-2.0-pro released in February this year, achieving best-in-class levels in disciplinary reasoning such as physics and medicine, and fine-grained perception; 视觉理解能力超越今年 2 月发布的 Doubao-Seed-2.0-pro，在物理、医疗等学科推理及细粒度感知领域达到同类最优水平；
  • Added audio understanding capabilities, supporting speech-to-text for 19 languages, mutual translation between Chinese/English and 14 other languages, with speech recognition and translation benchmark scores superior to Gemini-3.1-Pro; 新增音频理解能力，支持 19 个语种语音转写、中英文与 14 个语种互译，语音识别和翻译基准成绩优于 Gemini-3.1-Pro；
  • Video understanding can simultaneously analyze visuals and audio, supporting tracking of people and events across time periods; 视频理解可同步分析画面与声音，支持跨时间段追踪人物与事件；
  • Enhanced AI agent capabilities, supporting self-decomposition and verification of long-range tasks, deeply adapted to frameworks like OpenClaw and Hermes Agent; AI 智能体能力增强，支持长程任务自我拆解与校验，深度适配 OpenClaw、Hermes Agent 等框架；
  • GUI capabilities integrate interface recognition and operation execution, enabling continuous completion of business processes across applications and windows. GUI 能力打通界面识别与操作执行，可跨应用、跨窗口连续完成业务流程。

The new version of Doubao-Seed-2.0-mini, launched concurrently, also supports full-modal understanding, with significantly reduced thinking length and higher token efficiency compared to the previous version. 同期上线的 Doubao-Seed-2.0-mini 新版同样支持全模态理解，相比上一版本思考长度大幅缩短，Token 效率更高。

item.title: Inworld AI 发布 Realtime TTS-2 语音模型：可感知用户情绪，支持 100 种语言保持同一声线
item.guid: Inworld-AI-发布-Realtime-TTS-2-语音模型：可感知用户情绪，支持-100-种语言保持同一声线
item.description:
Yesterday, Inworld AI released its next-generation speech model, Realtime TTS-2, available to developers as a research preview via the Inworld API and Inworld Realtime API. 昨天，Inworld AI 发布新一代语音模型 Realtime TTS-2，以研究预览版形式通过 Inworld API 和 Inworld Realtime API 向开发者开放。

The core change in TTS-2 is a shift from a unidirectional text-to-speech pipeline to a closed-loop real-time conversational architecture: the model directly receives actual audio from the conversation, thereby perceiving the user's tone, rhythm, and emotional state and making corresponding adjustments. The new version adds four capabilities: TTS-2 的核心变化在于从单向文本转语音管线转向闭环实时对话架构：模型直接接收对话中的实际音频，从而感知用户的语气、节奏与情绪状态并作出相应调整。新版本新增四项能力：

  • Voice Direction: Describe the expression method using natural language, for example, "tired but gentle, like just coming home from work," and the model adjusts the voice style accordingly, no longer relying on fixed emotional tags; 语音指令（Voice Direction）：用自然语言描述表达方式，例如「疲惫但温柔，像刚下班回家」，模型据此调整语音风格，不再依赖固定情感标签；
  • Conversational Awareness: Automatically receives preceding audio in Realtime conversations, allowing tone and rhythm to carry over across turns; 对话感知（Conversational Awareness）：在 Realtime 会话中自动接收前序音频，语气与节奏可跨轮次延续；
  • Crosslingual Support: A single voice identity can seamlessly switch between over 100 languages, maintaining consistent vocal characteristics and persona, and supporting multilingual mixing within the same generated segment; 跨语言支持（Crosslingual）：单一声音身份可在超过 100 种语言间无缝切换，声线与人物特征保持一致，支持同一段生成中混用多语；
  • Advanced Voice Design: Reusable voice characters can be generated through text descriptions without reference audio, offering "expressive," "balanced," and "stable" modes. 高级语音设计（Advanced Voice Design）：无需参考音频，通过文字描述即可生成可复用声音角色，并提供「富有表现力」「均衡」「稳定」三种模式。

Additionally, the model supports inline non-linguistic markers (e.g., [laughter], [sigh]), voice cloning (by uploading 5 to 15 seconds of audio samples), and an initial packet delay of less than 200 milliseconds at the TTS layer. 此外，模型支持内联非语言标记（如【笑】【叹气】）、语音克隆（上传 5 至 15 秒音频样本即可），TTS 层首包延迟低于 200 毫秒。

item.title: 今年五一出行人数达 15.17 亿人次，创历史新高
item.guid: 今年五一出行人数达-15.17-亿人次，创历史新高
item.description: According to Xinhua News Agency, data from the Ministry of Transport shows that during this year's "May Day" holiday (May 1st to May 5th), the total cross-regional movement of people reached 1.517 billion person-times, an increase of 3.49% compared to the same period last year, setting a new historical high for the period. 据新华社报道，来自交通运输部的数据显示，今年「五一」假期（5 月 1 日至 5 月 5 日）全社会跨区域人员流动量达 15.17 亿人次，比去年同期增长 3.49%，创历史同期新高。

item.title: 小红书出手打击「惊喜盒子」仿冒账号
item.guid: 小红书出手打击「惊喜盒子」仿冒账号
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaohongshu released a special governance announcement, launching a concentrated crackdown on accounts that impersonate the official "Surprise Box" activity. The accounts targeted in this crackdown use "Surprise Box" or highly similar expressions in their names and engage in behaviors such as reposting official content, spreading "wool-gathering guides," diverting traffic to private domains, or attaching commercial links. 昨日，小红书发布专项治理公告，针对仿冒官方「惊喜盒子」活动的违规账号展开集中整治。此次被打击的账号名称使用「惊喜盒子」或高度近似表述，并存在搬运官方内容、传播「薅羊毛攻略」、引流私域或挂载商业链接等行为。

The announcement requires violating accounts to complete rectification within one week, including standardizing account names, deleting illegal content, and disbanding relevant group chats. For those who fail to rectify within the deadline, the platform will take measures such as traffic restrictions and account bans. 公告要求违规账号于一周内完成整改，包括规范账号名称、删除违规内容、解散相关群聊。逾期未整改者，平台将采取限流、封禁等措施。

item.title: 比亚迪取消员工园区免费充电
item.guid: 比亚迪取消员工园区免费充电
item.description:
BYD officially canceled the free charging benefit for employees in its parks starting yesterday. All AC charging piles, DC charging piles, and flash charging piles in all parks nationwide have begun to implement fee-based management. 比亚迪昨日起正式取消面向员工的园区免费充电福利，全国所有园区内的交流充电桩、直流充电桩及闪充桩均已开始实行收费管理。

According to Bian News, multiple netizens yesterday shared screenshots of BYD park charging pile fee standards on social media. Previously circulated notification documents showed that BYD began implementing this adjustment on May 6. According to the notice issued by BYD, the purpose of this adjustment is to "optimize the allocation of park charging resources, improve utilization efficiency, and ensure the long-term stable operation of facilities." 据鞭牛士报道，多名网友昨日在社交媒体晒出比亚迪园区充电桩收费标准截图。此前网传通知文件显示，比亚迪已于 5 月 6 日起执行这一调整。根据比亚迪发布的通知，此次调整目的是「优化园区充电资源配置，提高使用效率，保障设施长期稳定运行」。

The charging standard consists of two parts: electricity fees and service fees. Electricity fees are implemented according to the time-of-use industrial and commercial peak-valley electricity price standards announced by the local power grid, and the service fee is fixed at 0.10 yuan/kWh. 收费标准由电费和服务费两部分构成，电费按当地电网公布的工商业峰谷分时电价标准执行，服务费固定为 0.10 元/度。

Charging prices vary significantly across different parks. Taking the Shenzhen park as an example, the off-peak electricity price is 0.27 yuan/kWh, and with the service fee, the total cost is 0.37 yuan/kWh; the peak electricity price is 1.11 yuan/kWh, with a total cost of 1.21 yuan/kWh. 各地园区收费价格存在明显差异。以深圳园区为例，谷时电价为 0.27 元/度，加上服务费后总费用为 0.37 元/度；峰时电价为 1.11 元/度，总费用为 1.21 元/度。

In the Shanghai Songjiang Living Area Smart Charging Station, the off-peak electricity price is 0.51 yuan/kWh, and the peak electricity price reaches 1.20 yuan/kWh; in the Xi'an High-tech Apartment Building Smart Charging Station, the off-peak electricity price is 0.45 yuan/kWh. 上海松江生活区智充站谷时电价为 0.51 元/度，峰时电价达 1.20 元/度；西安高新公寓楼智充站谷时电价为 0.45 元/度。

item.title: 五一档票房 7.58 亿元，平均票价降至 36.3 元
item.guid: 五一档票房-7.58-亿元，平均票价降至-36.3-元
item.description:
According to CCTV News, citing data from the National Film Administration, the national box office for the May Day holiday this year was 758 million yuan, with 20.8419 million moviegoers and 2.376 million screenings, representing year-on-year increases of 1.41%, 10.23%, and 2% respectively. At the same time, the average ticket price decreased from 39.5 yuan in the same period last year to 36.3 yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 8%. 据央视新闻援引国家电影局数据报道，今年五一档全国电影票房为 7.58 亿元，观影人次达 2084.19 万，放映场次为 237.6 万场，同比分别增长 1.41%、10.23% 和 2%。与此同时，平均票价从去年同期的 39.5 元降至 36.3 元，同比下降 8%。

Official data shows that yesterday's May Day holiday box office has driven the output value of the entire industry chain, including culture, tourism, and catering, to exceed 11.5 billion yuan. Since the beginning of this year, the output value of the entire film industry chain has surpassed 210 billion yuan. 官方数据显示，昨日五一档票房已带动文旅、餐饮等全产业链产值超 115 亿元。今年以来，电影全产业链产值已突破 2100 亿元。

item.title: 《爱情抓马》登陆流媒体，全球票房破 1.2 亿美元
item.guid: 《爱情抓马》登陆流媒体，全球票房破-1.2-亿美元
item.description:
According to blogger "Hollywood Watch," the dark comedy film "Love Drama" officially landed on streaming platforms yesterday, with a theatrical window of about one month. The film tells the story of a loving couple whose wedding takes an unexpected turn. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，暗黑喜剧片《爱情抓马》昨日正式登陆流媒体平台，院线窗口期约一个月。影片讲述一对恩爱情侣的婚礼遭遇意外转折。

The film's global box office has accumulated over $120 million, with North America contributing approximately $47 million. According to media reports, the film's production cost was about $28 million. With this achievement, "Love Drama" became A24's fourth highest-grossing film globally, preceded by "Marcel the Shell with Shoes On," "Everything Everywhere All at Once," and "Civil War." 影片全球票房已累计超过 1.2 亿美元，其中北美票仓贡献约 4700 万美元。据媒体报道，影片制作成本约为 2800 万美元。凭借这一成绩，《爱情抓马》成为 A24 全球票房第四高的影片，位列其前的依次为《至尊马蒂》《瞬息全宇宙》和《美国内战》。
